name: bazi_converter
description: Build bazi.input.v1 JSON from birth info using lunar-javascript.

scripts.build:minor: node bin/build-bazi-json.js --date 2016-09-14 --time 05:50 --gender male --case-id 2016-09-14-0550-male-hefei --location "China, Hefei, Anhui, timezone Asia/Shanghai" --target-start-year 2026 --target-year-count 3 --out ../examples/2016-09-14-0550-male-hefei.json
scripts.build:minor:true-solar: node bin/build-bazi-json.js --date 2016-09-14 --time 05:50 --gender male --case-id 2016-09-14-0550-male-hefei-true-solar --location "China, Hefei, Anhui, timezone Asia/Shanghai" --use-true-solar-time --target-start-year 2026 --target-year-count 3 --out ../examples/2016-09-14-0550-male-hefei-true-solar.json
scripts.test: npm run build:female && npm run build:male && npm run build:minor && npm run build:minor:true-solar
